description: L402 middleware for Node.js — gate any Express, Hono, Deno, or Bun API behind Lightning, Cashu, or Stripe payments.
rules: toll-booth is payment-rail agnostic — configure Lightning (LND, CLN, Phoenixd), Cashu, NWC, or Stripe via payment providers.
Use the Express middleware for quickest integration: app.use(tollBooth(config)).
Pricing is defined per-route with support for metered, subscription, and one-time payment models.
